ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "name" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the event */,
  "qid" TEXT /* Reference to a external knowledge database (QID) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "point_in_time" TEXT /* Specific point in time if the event is instantaneous */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event took place */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the event location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the event location */,
  "event_url" TEXT /* URL linking to more information about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., war, political event, scientific discovery) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Parent event type ID (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_event_type" (
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the individual */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the individual */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the individual */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the individual */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL linking to an image of the individual */,
  "birthplace" TEXT /* Location where the individual was born */,
  "deathplace" TEXT /* Location where the individual died */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_individual" (
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the individual in the event (e.g., leader, participant) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the individual's role in the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the individual's involvement in the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the individual's involvement in the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "individual_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first individual */,
  "individual_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second individual */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., friend, enemy, ally) */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the relationship */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the source */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the source */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the source */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the source */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the source (if applicable) */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI number of the source (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_source" (
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the reference */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the reference */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the reference */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the reference */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the reference (if applicable) */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI number of the reference (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reference" (
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., photograph, illustration, painting) */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the video */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., documentary, interview, footage) */,
  "video_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event */,
  "audio_url" TEXT /* URL of the audio */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the audio */,
  "audio_type" TEXT /* Type of audio (e.g., speech, interview, music) */,
  "audio_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the audio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, historian, researcher) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "event_id" TEXT /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_comments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
